---
title: "Inferred spawning"
author: "Ewout Knoester"
date: "04/08/2025"
output: html_document
---

# Setup
```{r setup}

rm(list=ls()) # Clear workspace
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = '/tmp') #Set directory at current directory for all subsequent chunks
options(scipen = 99) # Have all numbers in non-scientific notation

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(cowplot)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)
library(plotly)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(ggtext)

```

# Load data
```{r dataload}

# === 1. LOAD AND CLEAN DATA ===

spawn.0raw <- as.data.frame(read_excel("Spawning database_2026-06.xlsx")) # Load in Excel
spawn.0raw <- spawn.0raw |>  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Date)) # Remove empty rows

# Pool multiple branches into single colony row, following logic: Mature > Immature > No
spawn.1clean <- spawn.0raw %>%
  dplyr::filter(Eggs %in% c("No", "Immature", "Mature")) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(ID.obs) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    colony_key = paste(
      Date, Observer, Species, Species.description, Depth_m, Colony.size_cm,
      sep = " | "
    ),
    ApproxColonyID = cumsum(
      colony_key != dplyr::lag(colony_key, default = dplyr::first(colony_key))
    ) + 1L
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(ApproxColonyID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    dplyr::across(-Eggs, dplyr::first),
    Branches_pooled = dplyr::n(),
    Eggs = dplyr::case_when(
      any(Eggs == "Mature") ~ "Mature",
      any(Eggs == "Immature") ~ "Immature",
      TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Eggs = factor(Eggs, levels = c("No", "Immature", "Mature"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Date,
    Reef.type,
    Species,
    Species.description,
    Colony.size_cm,
    Eggs,
    Comments,
    ApproxColonyID,
    Branches_pooled
  )

```


# Explore species naming
```{r taxonomy, eval=FALSE}

# Compare species names by different observers

spawn.check <- spawn.1clean %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Species = stringr::str_squish(as.character(Species)),
    Species.description = stringr::str_squish(as.character(Species.description))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(Species),
    !is.na(Species.description)
  )

all_species <- sort(unique(c(spawn.check$Species, spawn.check$Species.description)))

match_tab <- spawn.check %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Species = factor(Species, levels = all_species),
    Species.description = factor(Species.description, levels = all_species)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::count(Species, Species.description, name = "n") %>%
  tidyr::complete(
    Species,
    Species.description,
    fill = list(n = 0)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Species) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    row_total = sum(n),
    pct = dplyr::if_else(row_total > 0, 100 * n / row_total, 0),
    hover_text = paste0(
      "Species: ", Species,
      "<br>Species.description: ", Species.description,
      "<br>n: ", n,
      "<br>% within Species: ", round(pct, 1), "%"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

p <- ggplot(
  match_tab,
  aes(
    x = Species.description,
    y = Species,
    fill = pct,
    text = hover_text
  )
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "white",
    high = "steelblue",
    limits = c(0, 100),
    na.value = "white",
    name = "% within\nSpecies"
  ) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(
    x = "Species.description",
    y = "Species",
    title = "Match between Species and Species.description"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

plotly::ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text")

p_interactive <- plotly::ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text")

htmlwidgets::saveWidget(
  p_interactive,
  file = "species_match_heatmap.html",
  selfcontained = TRUE
)

```

```{r cleanup}

# Select only colonies >15 cm max diameter
spawn.1clean <- spawn.1clean %>%  dplyr::filter(Colony.size_cm >= 15)

# Rename / re-identify target species based on keyword matching
spawn.1clean <- spawn.1clean %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Species = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(Species) ~ Species,
      stringr::str_detect(Species, stringr::regex("divaricata|natalensis", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "A. divaricata",
      stringr::str_detect(Species, stringr::regex("polystoma",  ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "A. secale",
      stringr::str_detect(Species, stringr::regex("formosa",    ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "A. intermedia",
      stringr::str_detect(Species, stringr::regex("gemmifera",  ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "A. gemmifera",
      stringr::str_detect(Species, stringr::regex("latistella", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "A. selago",
      stringr::str_detect(Species, stringr::regex("tenuis",     ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "A. tenuis",
      stringr::str_detect(Species, stringr::regex("verweyi",    ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "A. austera",
      TRUE ~ Species
    )
  )

# Set unidentified species to A. spp., then pool anything with < 30 observations
spawn.1clean <- spawn.1clean %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Species = dplyr::if_else(
      !is.na(Species) &
        stringr::str_detect(Species, stringr::fixed("Acropora sp.")),
      "A. spp.",
      Species
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::add_count(Species, name = "Species_n") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Species = dplyr::if_else(
      !is.na(Species) &
        Species_n < 30 &
        stringr::str_detect(Species, stringr::regex("^A(cropora)?\\b", ignore_case = TRUE)),
      "A. spp.",
      Species
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-Species_n)

# Correct date typo
spawn.1clean <- spawn.1clean %>%  dplyr::mutate(
    Date = dplyr::if_else(
      as.Date(Date) == as.Date("2023-12-27") & Species == "A. selago",
      Date + lubridate::years(1), Date))

# Sort A. spp. to the end
spawn.1clean$Species <- factor(spawn.1clean$Species,
                               levels = c(setdiff(sort(unique(spawn.1clean$Species)), "A. spp."), "A. spp."))

# Select relevant columns
spawn.1clean <- spawn.1clean %>%
  dplyr::select(Date, Reef.type, Species, Species.description, Eggs, Comments) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Eggs %in% c("No", "Immature", "Mature"))

# Shared egg-status colours
egg_cols <- c(
  "No" = "gray70",
  "Immature" = "orange",
  "Mature" = "red"
)

# Set data types; set season to start from July
spawn.2sum <- spawn.1clean %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Date = as.Date(Date),
    Month = lubridate::month(Date),
    Year = lubridate::year(Date),
    Eggs = factor(Eggs, levels = c("No", "Immature", "Mature")),
    SeasonStartRaw = dplyr::if_else(Month >= 7, Year, Year - 1L),
    SeasonStart = dplyr::if_else(SeasonStartRaw <= 2022, 2023L, SeasonStartRaw),
    SeasonLabel = paste0(SeasonStart, "–", SeasonStart + 1),
    DayOfSeason = as.integer(Date - as.Date(paste0(SeasonStartRaw, "-07-01"))) + 1,
    x_numeric = DayOfSeason
  )


# === 1b. MERGE CLOSE SAMPLING DATES ===

merged_dates <- spawn.2sum %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Species, SeasonLabel, Date) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Species, SeasonLabel) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    DateDiff = as.numeric(Date - dplyr::lag(Date, default = dplyr::first(Date))),
    DateGroup = cumsum(dplyr::if_else(DateDiff > 5, 1, 0))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Species, SeasonLabel, DateGroup) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    MergedDate = as.Date(
      round(mean(as.numeric(Date)), 0),
      origin = "1970-01-01"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

spawn.2sum <- merged_dates %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Date = MergedDate,
    Month = lubridate::month(Date),
    Year = lubridate::year(Date),
    SeasonStartRaw = dplyr::if_else(Month >= 7, Year, Year - 1L),
    SeasonStart = dplyr::if_else(SeasonStartRaw <= 2022, 2023L, SeasonStartRaw),
    SeasonLabel = paste0(SeasonStart, "–", SeasonStart + 1),
    DayOfSeason = as.integer(Date - as.Date(paste0(SeasonStartRaw, "-07-01"))) + 1,
    x_numeric = DayOfSeason
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-DateDiff, -DateGroup, -MergedDate)

# Get overage per month (pooled across all years)
mature_month_pooled <- spawn.2sum %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Month) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_colonies = dplyr::n(),
    n_mature = sum(Eggs == "Mature", na.rm = TRUE),
    perc_mature = mean(Eggs == "Mature", na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Month)





# === 2. SUMMARISE BY SPECIES-SEASON-DATE ===

spawn.3pie <- spawn.2sum %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Species, SeasonLabel, Date, Eggs, x_numeric) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(n = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Species, SeasonLabel, Date, x_numeric) %>%
  tidyr::complete(
    Eggs = factor(
      c("No", "Immature", "Mature"),
      levels = c("No", "Immature", "Mature")
    ),
    fill = list(n = 0)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(frac = n / sum(n)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Species, SeasonLabel, Date) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(n_total = sum(n)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()


# === 3. Y-AXIS POSITIONS ===

species_levels <- levels(spawn.1clean$Species)   # A. spp. already last

y_order <- spawn.3pie %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Species, SeasonLabel) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    SpeciesFct = factor(Species, levels = species_levels),

    SpeciesEpithet = stringr::str_replace(Species, "^A\\.\\s+", ""),

    SpeciesShort = dplyr::if_else(
      Species == "A. spp.",
      "<i>A.</i> spp.",
      paste0("<i>A. ", SpeciesEpithet, "</i>")
    ),

    SeasonShort = stringr::str_replace(
      SeasonLabel, "20([0-9]{2})[–-]20([0-9]{2})", "\\1-\\2"
    ),

    YLabel = paste(SpeciesShort, SeasonShort)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(SpeciesFct, SeasonLabel) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Ypos = rev(dplyr::row_number())) %>%
  dplyr::select(-SpeciesFct, -SpeciesEpithet)

spawn.3pie <- spawn.3pie %>%
  dplyr::left_join(y_order, by = c("Species", "SeasonLabel"))

# === 3b. FULL MOON DATES ===

full_moons_raw <- tibble::tibble(
  FullMoonDate = as.Date(c(
    # 2023–2024 season
    "2023-07-03",
    "2023-08-01",
    "2023-08-31",
    "2023-09-29",
    "2023-10-28",
    "2023-11-27",
    "2023-12-27",
    "2024-01-25",
    "2024-02-24",
    "2024-03-25",
    "2024-04-24",
    "2024-05-23",
    "2024-06-22",

    # 2024–2025 season
    "2024-07-21",
    "2024-08-19",
    "2024-09-18",
    "2024-10-17",
    "2024-11-16",
    "2024-12-15",
    "2025-01-14",
    "2025-02-12",
    "2025-03-14",
    "2025-04-13",
    "2025-05-12",
    "2025-06-11"
  ))
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Month = lubridate::month(FullMoonDate),
    Year = lubridate::year(FullMoonDate),
    SeasonStartRaw = dplyr::if_else(Month >= 7, Year, Year - 1L),
    SeasonStart = dplyr::if_else(SeasonStartRaw <= 2022, 2023L, SeasonStartRaw),
    SeasonLabel = paste0(SeasonStart, "–", SeasonStart + 1),
    x_numeric = as.integer(
      FullMoonDate - as.Date(paste0(SeasonStartRaw, "-07-01"))
    ) + 1
  )

full_moon_rows <- y_order %>%
  dplyr::left_join(full_moons_raw, by = "SeasonLabel") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(FullMoonDate))


# === 3c. GAUSSIAN-SMOOTHED POOLED EGG-STATUS BAR ===

bottom_y <- min(y_order$Ypos) - 1
bar_height <- 0.65

# Smoothing strength.
# Larger = smoother. Try 10, 21, 30, 45, 60.
smooth_sd_days <- 10

# Circular seasonal distance, so late June and early July are treated as close
season_dist <- function(a, b) {
  pmin(abs(a - b), 366 - abs(a - b))
}

pooled_egg_bar <- tibble::tibble(x_bar = 1:366) %>%
  tidyr::crossing(
    Eggs = factor(
      c("No", "Immature", "Mature"),
      levels = c("No", "Immature", "Mature")
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rowwise() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    weighted_n = sum(
      exp(
        -0.5 *
          (season_dist(spawn.2sum$x_numeric, x_bar) / smooth_sd_days)^2
      ) *
        (as.character(spawn.2sum$Eggs) == as.character(Eggs)),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::arrange(x_bar, Eggs) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(x_bar) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    weighted_total = sum(weighted_n),
    frac = dplyr::if_else(weighted_total > 0, weighted_n / weighted_total, 0),
    ymin_frac = dplyr::lag(cumsum(frac), default = 0),
    ymax_frac = cumsum(frac),
    xmin = x_bar - 0.5,
    xmax = x_bar + 0.5,
    ymin = bottom_y - bar_height / 2 + ymin_frac * bar_height,
    ymax = bottom_y - bar_height / 2 + ymax_frac * bar_height
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()


# === 4. BASE PLOT ===

dummy_points <- y_order %>%
  dplyr::mutate(x = 0)

month_starts <- seq(as.Date("2000-07-01"), as.Date("2001-06-01"), by = "1 month")
month_days <- as.integer(month_starts - as.Date("2000-07-01")) + 1
month_labels <- format(month_starts, "%b")

plot_base <- ggplot() +

  # Full moon markers, row-specific
  geom_segment(
    data = full_moon_rows,
    aes(
      x = x_numeric,
      xend = x_numeric,
      y = Ypos - 0.35,
      yend = Ypos + 0.35
    ),
    linewidth = 0.6,
    linetype = "dotted",
    colour = "grey45",
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +

  # Gaussian-smoothed pooled egg-status bar across all species
  geom_rect(
    data = pooled_egg_bar,
    aes(
      xmin = xmin,
      xmax = xmax,
      ymin = ymin,
      ymax = ymax,
      fill = Eggs
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    colour = NA
  ) +

  geom_point(
    data = dummy_points,
    aes(x = x, y = Ypos),
    alpha = 0
  ) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = month_days,
    labels = month_labels,
    limits = c(0, 366),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +

  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(y_order$Ypos, bottom_y),
    labels = c(
      y_order$YLabel,
      "All species pooled"
    ),
    expand = expansion(add = 1)
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(
    values = egg_cols,
    guide = "none"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 15),
    axis.text.y.left = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 15),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )


# === 5. PIE CHART FUNCTION ===

make_pie_grob <- function(df_group, show_legend = FALSE) {
  ggplot(df_group, aes(x = "", y = frac, fill = Eggs)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1) +
    coord_polar("y") +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = egg_cols,
      name = "Egg status"
    ) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      legend.position = if (show_legend) "right" else "none"
    )
}

radius_scale <- function(n) {
  scales::rescale(
    n,
    to = c(3, 7),
    from = range(spawn.3pie$n_total, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}


# === 6. DRAW PIE CHARTS ===

group_ids <- spawn.3pie %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Species, SeasonLabel, Date) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_rows = dplyr::n(),
    x_numeric = dplyr::first(x_numeric),
    Ypos = dplyr::first(Ypos),
    n_total = dplyr::first(n_total),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_rows == 3)

pie_layers <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(group_ids))) {

  group_data <- spawn.3pie %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      Species == group_ids$Species[i],
      SeasonLabel == group_ids$SeasonLabel[i],
      Date == group_ids$Date[i]
    )

  grob <- ggplotGrob(make_pie_grob(group_data))

  xpos <- group_ids$x_numeric[i]
  ypos <- group_ids$Ypos[i]
  radius <- radius_scale(group_ids$n_total[i])

  pie_layers[[i]] <- annotation_custom(
    grob,
    xmin = xpos - radius,
    xmax = xpos + radius,
    ymin = ypos - radius * 0.1,
    ymax = ypos + radius * 0.1
  )
}

for (layer in pie_layers) {
  plot_base <- plot_base + layer
}


# Safety override: force markdown rendering after all layers are added
plot_base <- plot_base +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 15),
    axis.text.y.left = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 15)
  )


# === 7. LEGENDS ===

# Egg status legend
legend_data <- tibble::tibble(
  Eggs = factor(
    c("No", "Immature", "Mature"),
    levels = c("No", "Immature", "Mature")
  ),
  frac = c(1 / 3, 1 / 3, 1 / 3)
)

egg_legend_grob <- cowplot::get_legend(
  ggplot(legend_data, aes(x = "", y = frac, fill = Eggs)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1) +
    coord_polar("y") +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = egg_cols,
      name = "Egg status"
    ) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15, margin = margin(b = 8)),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.key.size = unit(12, "pt"),
      legend.box.margin = margin(0, 10, 0, 0)
    )
)

egg_legend_wrapped <- patchwork::wrap_elements(egg_legend_grob)


# Sampling effort legend
n_range <- range(spawn.3pie$n_total, na.rm = TRUE)
n_small <- n_range[1]
n_large <- n_range[2]

make_scaled_pie_grob <- function(n_val) {
  df <- tibble::tibble(
    Eggs = factor(
      c("No", "Immature", "Mature"),
      levels = c("No", "Immature", "Mature")
    ),
    frac = c(1 / 3, 1 / 3, 1 / 3),
    n_total = n_val
  )

  ggplotGrob(make_pie_grob(df))
}

grob_small <- make_scaled_pie_grob(n_small)
grob_large <- make_scaled_pie_grob(n_large)

n_label <- function(n) {
  paste0("n = ", n, ifelse(n == 1, " colony", " colonies"))
}

legend_large_width <- 0.045
legend_panel_aspect <- 10

legend_width <- function(n) {
  legend_large_width * radius_scale(n) / radius_scale(n_large)
}

legend_height <- function(n) {
  legend_width(n) * legend_panel_aspect
}

w_large <- legend_width(n_large)
h_large <- legend_height(n_large)

w_small <- legend_width(n_small)
h_small <- legend_height(n_small)

title_y <- 0.90
large_y <- 0.50
small_y <- 0.20

sampling_legend_wrapped <- cowplot::ggdraw() +

  cowplot::draw_label(
    "Sampling effort",
    x = 0.02,
    y = title_y,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0.5,
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 15
  ) +

  cowplot::draw_grob(
    grob_large,
    x = 0.06 - w_large / 2,
    y = large_y - h_large / 2,
    width = w_large,
    height = h_large
  ) +
  cowplot::draw_label(
    n_label(n_large),
    x = 0.14,
    y = large_y,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0.5,
    size = 14
  ) +

  cowplot::draw_grob(
    grob_small,
    x = 0.06 - w_small / 2,
    y = small_y - h_small / 2,
    width = w_small,
    height = h_small
  ) +
  cowplot::draw_label(
    n_label(n_small),
    x = 0.14,
    y = small_y,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0.5,
    size = 14
  ) +

  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 0.60,
    xend = 0.60,
    y = 0.28,
    yend = 0.72,
    linewidth = 0.45,
    linetype = "dotted",
    colour = "grey45",
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 0.66,
    y = 0.50,
    label = "Full moon",
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0.5,
    size = 5
  )

legend_row <- egg_legend_wrapped + sampling_legend_wrapped +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, widths = c(0.85, 1.65))


# === 8. COMBINE AND SAVE ===

combined_plot <- legend_row / plot_base +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1.2, 10))

print(combined_plot)

ggsave(
  "inferredSpawning_Species x Season x Eggs.tiff",
  plot = combined_plot,
  width = 35,
  height = 25,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 1200,
  compression = "lzw"
)


```
